Brief



1. Who’s the Audience?

Over 28 years old on average, mistakes in the past with credit cards and not paying off cards. Many have gone through bad credit because of divorce. Feel like their bad credit is holding them back from life, jobs, relationships, more freedom. 





2. What are the pain points, or biggest fears?

(+ identify the 1-3 HUGE ones, while the rest are secondary)



- Short Term:

Not being able to get an apartment, not getting approved for credit cards, not getting a job because of their score, divorce hurt their credit score, can’t move forward in their relationship (move in with each other) because they can’t get approved for house/apartment. 

Never knowing if your card will go through, worrying about having enough at the end of the month. 





-Long Term:

Insecurity, not feeling like they’re a real adult. 

Family - disappointing them, can’t take of obligations to them, can’t pay for college for kids, having to ask parents for money as an adult (shame again too)

Relationships falling apart or ending.

Takes a toll on their self esteem.

Shame - feeling like there’s something with you, can’t do anything right, feeling like a failure. 



This thing that hangs over your thoughts and emotions every day, for year-after-year. Nobody knows though, you don’t talk about it - it’s this secret shame. 



FOMO when other people are buying houses, starting businesses, etc - you can’t. 



Always feeling like a prisoner, or like you’re trapped...like there’s a cloud hanging over your head. Feeling like you’ll never be able to get ahead in life, you’ll alway be playing catchup, that it’s going to stop you from living your best life, and always be throttling you and your opportunities. 





3. So by reversing the pain points/biggest fears, what is the one big promise (1-3 sentences) you are going to make about the sales copy they’re now reading…how this will change their lives forever?



Inside this letter I’m going to show you how you can quickly, easily, and painlessly raise your credit score WITHOUT needing a law degree, or having to spend hours each day on the phone with banks and credit card companies. Armed with this vital information, for the first time in years you’ll feel like a new apartment, or a home, or a low-interest credit card really is within your reach. And you’ll once again be able to walk life through this life holding your head up with pride - because you’ll know you’re doing EVERYTHING necessary to regain financial freedom and be a role model for your spouse, kids, and everyone else in life who looks to you as a provider. 









4. What solutions for the reader’s problem (s) exist already (and why aren’t they working for them)?



Lexington Law



Scammy, they make you do all the work, Credit scores aren’t raising but they’re still charging you, Credit scores are actually lowering, they keep charging me money every month for services I didn't ask for, 

All removed accounts come back. They charge a 15.59$ processing fee, A 129.99$ work fee and a monthly fee of 129.99$. So say you want to use their service for one month, it would cost you roughly around $275. They are all nothing but Glorified letter writer.

Automated systems, talking to a robot after one call with a paralegal, not helpful, not good advice. 





Creditrepair.com -







Credit books - short, confusing, no guidance, could get the same info for free on YouTube or Google. Crappy format, etc. 

Forums (myfico, credit karma, 











5. What’s the new claim/root cause/surprising info? And how does this new solution we’re offering them work? [This is the Unique Mechanism Part]



(Think about it as if they had 99% of the solution already, but you’re sharing that missing 1%...the easy but unexpected REAL REASON, or REAL SECRET to their success).



Mechanism of the Problem:

The reason you weren’t able to raise your credit scores in the past is because your dispute letters were never given attention. The letters were immediately sent to e OSCAR and they never had a fighting chance: even when you included more than enough proof to back up your case. 



when you send your dispute letters to the agencies, it is not read by a human. instead it is sent directly to a machine called e OSCAR. and most of the time, even with verifiable information, disputes are automatically rejected.



Also the AI can pick up on trending letters, or repetitive language and deny your claim for that reason alone, which is why using boiler-plate solutions, and even big firms like Lexington Law rarely get your the results that you want. 





Mechanism of the Solution:

So what you need to do is use certain keywords and phrases that can “speak” to the AI the credit card companies are using, get it’s attention, and have it flag your request as valid. Not only that, but you need to make sure your letter looks “unique” to the A.I. - otherwise it’ll get rejected immediately.







6. Paradoxical Question:

Why do credit card companies start mailing offers to us as soon as we turn 18?



Why is it so easy for an 18 year old college student in debt to get a new credit card, but so hard for adults with jobs like me?



Why is it so easy to destroy your credit but so hard to repair it?



Why do people with more debt sometimes have much better credit than people with less? 



How can I build my credit when nobody will GIVE me credit?





7. Metaphor:

It’s like being in trouble in a foriegn country, going to a police officer to ask for help, but they don’t understand what you’re saying and just walk away (because you aren’t speaking the same language). 



It’s like going to the ATM and not being able to take out any money because your PIN # is the same as someone elses. 



It’s like if you change the language settings on a friends phone and they can’t figure out how to change it bakc. 



Like a bouncer at a club and if you’re not meeting the “dress code” (i.e. the words/templates) they throw you out.





8. Bold Claim 

(What’s the huge promise about the results they’re going to get using this product/solution?):



If you use the the done-for-you, micro-customizable templates inside this program, along with the simple, easy-to-follow steps, you will be able to get your Credit Score back above 700 over time. 







9. What is the Product? 

(If you can write out fascinations here, it will help you immensely. This is the part where you get to shape exactly what the product we’re selling will include)



Introducing PRODUCT. 



PRODUCT is the first done-with-you, credit-fixing system that was specifically designed to work WITH the credit companies AI Algorithms, instead of against them.



Inside you’ll get 30 “Flex Templates” that you’re able to take, slightly tweak, and send into the credit bureaus...and that are PROVEN to pass their AI Criteria and get past deliquencie and mistakes off your record. 



Anyone can use….











10. Background Story + Story of Discovery: 













11. Some Headline Ideas: 

(One sentence – something that would be the first line of the VSL, or in the copy above the video screen. Attention grabbing)



The Secret Credit Repair “Computer Guard” That’s Blocking Your Appeals and Keeping Your Credit In The Dumps (Plus, the 3 Easy Steps That Can Fix Your Credit FAST!)



The A.I. Gate Keeper That’s Stopping You From Having Good Credit - Even If You Haven’t Missed A Payment In Over Two Years (Plus What You Can Do To Fix Your Score FAST). 









12. Ideas for a potential upsell product?

(Something that could be sold to the customer immediately after purchasing the main product. You’d want this to be related to product, but solve an additional problem, or provide a significant additional benefit). 



Done For You Services
